29 & 30 April 2026  ·  Chennai

An Ancient Tamil Saying

"செம்புலப் பெயல்நீர் போல,
அன்புடை நெஞ்சம் தாம் கலந்தனவே"

— Kurunthogai

Like red earth and pouring rain,
our hearts have found their fated path.

Where the self finds the other

Join us as we celebrate the destined bond
that mingled our hearts into one beautiful chapter.

The Couple

Meet the Two

The Groom

Hariguruprasadh

By day, he's debugging code; by night, he's losing his mind over RCB and Real Madrid. When he isn't busy trying to find the perfect lighting for a photo or a trail that won't break his legs, Hari is making the biggest career move of his life. He's officially been traded from the "Bachelor League" to team up with Akshaya's Winning Team. The contract is signed, the cape is retired, and for once, he's actually on the winning side.

The Bride

Akshaya

High-performing Investment Banker, CSK super-fan, and a total hairdo specialist. With a massive craze for sweets and a clear vision for her goals, Akshaya doesn't just dream — she executes and achieves it. Now, she's ready to start a new chapter with Hari, filled with love, food, and plenty of 'Whistle Podu' moments!
